name: Veal Scaloppine Piccata
recipeIngredient: 1 pound veal scallops, trimmed and pounded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a serving dish in the oven or microwave. Place flour on a plate. Lightly dip both sides of each veal scallop in the flour, shaking off excess. In a large, heavy skillet over medium-high heat, warm 2 tablespoons butter with oil until very hot and fragrant. Add the scallops (working in batches if needed) and brown lightly on both sides for about 1 minute per side. Remove to the prepared serving dish, season with salt and pepper, and cover with foil to keep warm.
2. Drain the oil from the skillet. Add lemon juice and scrape up any browned bits. Stir in the remaining butter along with capers and parsley. Return veal to the sauce and heat briefly over medium, turning to coat. Place the veal and sauce back on the serving dish, garnish with remaining parsley and lemon slices if desired, and serve immediately.
